summary: Iteration 62 - Strict i18n mode + 7 UI bug fixes testing. All 31 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.js: t() now returns empty string if current locale is missing - NO cross-locale fallback (strict mode)
i18n.js: adminText() helper returns first non-empty locale for CMS item previews
i18n.js: hasAnyTranslation() helper used to conditionally render section headers
i18n.js: setLocaleValue() no longer creates _legacy keys - legacy strings dropped on first edit
aurexSchemas.js: itemPreview functions use adminText() to avoid React errors with dict objects
aurexSchemas.js: Added cta_new_tab to aurex_audience + aurex_pricing; view_all_new_tab to aurex_team + aurex_events
AurexSections.js: Removed all hardcoded default fallbacks ('Our Services', 'Testimonials', etc)
AurexSections.js: All buttons use rounded-sm (border-radius: 0px) - rectangular style
AurexSections.js: Testimonials photo uses t.image || t.avatar; role uses tt(t.title) || tt(t.role)
AurexSections.js: AurexServicesMono only wraps card in <a> when s.external_url is set
AurexSectionsManager.js: item list wraps item.description and item.badge with adminText()
seed_data_creation: aurex_audience config seeded with {title: {en: 'Only English Title', es: ''}} to test strict i18n
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified all 8 user feedback fixes: (1) Video section no _legacy fallback, (2) Open-in-new-window fields working, (3) Strict i18n mode - empty locale shows nothing, (4) FR bug fixed - /admin/aurex-sections loads without React error, (5) AurexSectionsManager item list uses adminText(), (6) Rectangular buttons (border-radius: 0px), (7) Services cards not clickable without external_url, (8) Testimonials show photo + name + role correctly.

backend: PUT /api/admin/aurex/{section}/config accepts and persists localized dict values with cta_new_tab
GET /api/public/aurex/{section} returns config with localized values
cta_new_tab field persisted for aurex_audience, aurex_pricing items
view_all_new_tab field persisted for aurex_team, aurex_events
All 13 Aurex public endpoints return 200 with config
GET /api/public/testimonials returns testimonials with image/avatar field
GET /api/public/services returns services with external_url field
Section config headers (eyebrow/title/subtitle) accept localized values
Strict i18n: config with {en: 'value', es: ''} stored correctly
FR language support: item with FR-only title created and retrieved without error
frontend: /admin/aurex-sections loads without React 'Objects are not valid as a React child' error
LocalizedField shows EN/ES tabs for text fields
'Open CTA in new window' checkbox visible and enabled
Language switcher visible with EN/ES options
Language switcher toggles correctly between EN and ES
Testimonials show author name and role below name
Services card without external_url is <div> (not clickable)
Video section does NOT contain '_legacy' text
Services section uses CMS config (not hardcoded defaults)
Strict i18n: ES locale empty shows nothing (no EN fallback)
Section header hidden when title/subtitle empty in current locale

bugs_verified_fixed.status: FIXED - cta_new_tab and view_all_new_tab fields working

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Section config showing EN fallback in ES locale
bugs_verified_fixed.status: FIXED - Strict i18n mode returns empty string, section header hidden

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: FR language causing React error in /admin/aurex-sections
bugs_verified_fixed.status: FIXED - Page loads without error, adminText() handles dict objects

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Testimonials photos missing (image vs avatar mismatch)

bugs_verified_fixed.status: FIXED - All buttons use rounded-sm (0px border-radius)
FIXED - Cards without external_url render as <div> (not clickable)

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Testimonials Role field not displaying below Author Name
bugs_verified_fixed.status: FIXED - Role uses tt(t.title) || tt(t.role) and displays below name
